0: You will be provided with the description for a game within the GVGAI framework as well as five sample levels for that game. Your task is to create ONE new level that is conducive to the rules of the game. You will output your level in the same text format seen in the sample levels, and you will use the '[' and ']' characters to mark the beginning and end of your level output, respectively. Output ONLY the level
1: You will be provided with the description for a game within the GVGAI framework as well as five sample levels for that game. Your task is to create ONE new level for this game. Every row in your output level must be the same length. You will output your level map as a series of characters with a newline seperating rows. Output ONLY the level characters
2: You will be provided with the description for a game within the GVGAI framework as well as one sample levels for that game. Your task is to use this information to create one new level. You will output your level as lines of text. This is the only thing that you will output.
3: You will be provided with a sample level. Your task is to use your knowledge to create one new level. You will output your new level as lines of text.
